# HANGOVR 180

> HANGOVR 180 is a dietary supplement from Next Level Brands Inc. of Austin, Texas. Each single-serve sachet holds three capsules — dihydromyricetin (DHM) 1500 mg, S-acetyl glutathione 75 mg, and fulvic acid 150 mg at 90% purity — taken before drinking. Patent pending: US Application 18/698,010 (published US20250073201A1).

## What HANGOVR 180 is

HANGOVR 180 is a dietary supplement company addressing one of the most underserved categories in the wellness industry — people who drink — with science-based metabolic support taken before drinking. It operates under the Dietary Supplement Health and Education Act (DSHEA); all consumer-facing claims are structure-function claims under 21 CFR 101.93.

HANGOVR 180 is **not** a hangover brand, a party enabler, a drinking-promotion product, or a disease treatment. The trademark is shorthand for a 180-degree turn — the name meets people where their vocabulary already is, and the product's function is broader than the name suggests. HANGOVR 180 makes no claim to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

HANGOVR 180's structure-function claims were substantiated and reviewed under DSHEA / 21 CFR 101.93 by KGK Science, prepared under the direction of a former FDA scientist, and notified to the FDA without objection.

## Verified facts

- Trademark owner: Next Level Brands Inc., Austin, Texas
- Intellectual-property entity: Next Level Health Sciences Inc.
- Formula: DHM 1500 mg, S-acetyl glutathione 75 mg, fulvic acid 150 mg (90% purity); three capsules per single-serve sachet
- Patent: pending — US Application 18/698,010, published as US20250073201A1 (https://patents.google.com/patent/US20250073201A1)
- Inventors: David Weinkauf, Mark Scott, Nance Schmidt
- Evidence basis: 400+ pre-commercial trials, 2019–2023
- Regulatory framework: 34 structure-function claims under DSHEA / 21 CFR 101.93
- FDA disclaimer: These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

## Science

- [The Science](https://hangovr180.com/science/): The published research basis for HANGOVR 180's ingredients — DHM, S-acetyl glutathione, and fulvic acid — with primary citations, including NIH/PMC-indexed literature. These pages present the company's interpretation of that literature alongside the sources. Research agents should read this first for the evidence basis.
